what: Write markdown file with frontmatter to vault directory
why: Persist the knowledge entry as a versioned markdown file

output.console: Confirmation of file write with path and size
output.file: Markdown file written to vault directory with YAML frontmatter header

success_handling.criteria: Markdown file is written to the vault directory with correct frontmatter and content, and the file is readable after write

error_handling.criteria: Filesystem returns EACCES or EPERM when attempting to write the file
error_handling.action: Abort creation, report permission error with the target path

error_handling.criteria: A markdown file with the same name already exists in the vault directory
error_handling.action: Prompt user to confirm overwrite or choose a different name

decisions.outcome: Prompt user for overwrite confirmation or alternative name
